However, this is outside the scope of this static code review.\n- The reports correctly identify the code as standard and benign.\n\n5. **Consistency and Recommendations**:\n- The scores are consistent with the analysis.\n- No adjustments needed based on the code content.\n- The high confidence levels are justified.\n\n---\n\n### Final Assessment:\n\n- **Malware Score**: 0 (no malicious code detected)\n- **Obfuscated Score**: 0 (clear, autogenerated code)\n- **Risk Score**: 0.0–0.1 (minimal, primarily due to potential misuse in deployment, not in the code itself)\n\n### **My own estimates**:\n- **Malware**: 0\n- **Obfuscated**: 0\n- **Risk**: 0.1 (very low; standard interface factory)\n\n**Conclusion**: The code is a typical, safe autogenerated ERC20 interface factory with no malicious or suspicious elements.
